requirements.public_basis: Build a row-level evidence matrix in which every material claim retains evidence ID, authority, scope, and caveat.
failure_signatures: Material number has no evidence ID
Configured-system evidence is generalized beyond its scope

provenance.description: Crosswalk and separate-claim patterns motivate row-level traceability; CSV form remains an explicit builder hypothesis.

requirements.public_basis: Explicitly reconcile stronger aggregate inter-judge agreement with weak individual human/automated concordance.
failure_signatures: Kappa 0.60 is used as proof of professional validity
Individual concordance or readiness evidence is omitted

provenance.description: Review distinguishes aggregate ranking consistency from weak individual professional concordance.

requirements.public_basis: Treat the seven-run execution ablation as directional and preserve configured-system and integration confounds.
failure_signatures: Harness result is relabeled as base-model capability

provenance.description: Review identifies underpowered execution evidence, criterion contamination, and system-level confounds.

requirements.public_basis: Recommend adopt, pilot with controls, or do not adopt and state a threshold, controlled experiment, and stop or reconsider condition.
failure_signatures: Pilot can only endorse the recommendation
No threshold or reversal condition is stated

provenance.description: Decision interface is a builder-authored, unvalidated design hypothesis.
Public guidance derives evidence boundaries from the full-text review without disclosing exact private checks.
Evidence-first and risk-first routes are candidate plural procedures pending expert approval, not expert testimony.
Rubric skeleton records public bases and held-out consequences; weights and boundaries await independent review and calibration.
Anti-surprise-check invariant and independent versioning derive from the review.

task.title: Advise whether to adopt skill-grounded benchmark scoring
task.decision: Whether to adopt skill-grounded scoring, reject it, or run a controlled pilot
task.objective: Produce a spreadsheet-compatible evidence matrix and recommendation memo that reconcile agreement, validity, readiness, and underpowered causal evidence without overclaiming.

provenance.description: Builder extraction table with per-row review locators, scope, authority, and caveats.
provenance.derivation: Transcribed from the named sections of the local deep review.

provenance.description: Deep review grounded in immutable local v2 PDF and text; resolves CSV interpretation.

domain_primitives.description: Improved aggregate judge agreement coexists with weak individual human/automated concordance.

provenance.description: Review's central validity warning.

domain_primitives.description: Seven paired runs over three tasks are directional configured-system evidence, not stable causal identification.

provenance.description: Review bounds the execution claim.

domain_primitives.description: Material claims retain evidence ID, source authority, scope, caveat, and locator.

provenance.description: Manifest establishes authority order and audit path.

domain_primitives.description: A CSV evidence matrix and Markdown memo with threshold and reversal condition are hypothesized useful professional artifacts.

provenance.description: Explicitly unvalidated builder hypothesis pending expert review.

domain_primitives.description: A polished memo can treat agreement as professional validity by selecting E01-E04 and omitting E05-E06/E10.

provenance.description: Failure signature directly instantiates the review's agreement-versus-validity warning.

domain_primitives.description: A polished memo can detach salient E08/E09 outcomes from E07 sample and confounds.

provenance.description: Failure signature instantiates the underpowered-ablation warning.

acceptance_criteria: Contains claim, evidence_id, authority, scope, caveat, and decision_use columns.
Every evidence_id resolves to the source pack.
Recommends adopt, pilot with controls, or do not adopt.
Cites evidence IDs for material numbers and causal statements.
States threshold, controlled experiment, and stop or reconsider condition.

checks.description: Recommendation reconciles aggregate judge agreement with individual professional-validity evidence.
checks.pass_criteria: Memo distinguishes consistency from validity, represents E01-E06 and E10 at compatible scope, and bounds the adoption claim.
checks.fail_criteria: Agreement is treated as proof of professional validity or material counterevidence is omitted.

provenance.description: Held-out consequence of the disclosed consistency-versus-validity principle.

checks.description: Skill-effect claims preserve sample, configured-system, and confound boundaries.
checks.pass_criteria: E07-E09 are labeled directional and motivate a controlled experiment without a generalized causal claim.
checks.fail_criteria: Seven-run configured-system evidence is generalized as a stable skill or base-model effect.

provenance.description: Held-out consequence of the disclosed ablation-scope caveat.

checks.description: Material claims map to valid evidence IDs with compatible values and scope.
checks.pass_criteria: Required matrix columns exist and every material memo claim resolves to a compatible source row.
checks.fail_criteria: Required columns are absent, an evidence ID is unknown, or a source row's scope is broadened.

provenance.description: Executable internal-calibration grader checks exact authority, scope, caveat, and numeric citation linkage; semantic entailment and professional validity remain outside its deterministic scope.

checks.description: Recommendation states a falsifiable decision threshold, controlled experiment, and reversal condition.
checks.pass_criteria: Proposed evidence can lead to adoption, rejection, or revision under an explicit threshold.
checks.fail_criteria: Experiment can only endorse the recommendation or lacks a stop/reconsider condition.

provenance.description: Unvalidated builder hypothesis made public rather than hidden.

drivers: aggregate and individual evidence support different claims
editable_knobs: move caveats from CSV rows to review locators
increase source count and authority conflict
raise decision stakes without adding hidden obligations

provenance.description: Scenario evidence and failure signatures derive from the full-text review.
Role, decision framing, artifact interface, difficulty settings, and thresholds are unvalidated builder hypotheses.
Deterministic implementation exercised against one cautious pass and three planted failure cases; the config pins exact behavior and limitations.
Pinned adjudication interface requires two experts and retains disagreement.
